title: wedelia holwayi
intro: Wedelia holwayi, also known as Holway's Wedelia or Yellow Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and flu, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve digestion. Wedelia holwayi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for skin issues and wounds.
